name: Lift state into provider components
description: HIGH: move state management into a Provider so siblings (outside the visual component tree) can access shared state/actions without prop drilling or refs.

metadata.intent: Enable shared state across siblings by lifting state into a Provider boundary

must_not: Sync state upward via useEffect on every change
Read state from refs on submit
conventions: Provider boundary matters; components may live outside visual nesting but inside provider.

steps.description: Extract state + actions into `XProvider` that sets the context value.
Move sibling UI that needs access (preview buttons, footer actions) inside the provider boundary.
Delete prop drilling / useEffect syncing / ref readbacks introduced only for state access.
